text: French President Macron: It is likely that, following the American decision to maintain a targeted blockade — particularly concerning Iran — the Iranian authorities changed their initial position. I think this is a mistake on both sides.
text_zh: 法国总统马克龙：在美国决定维持有针对性的封锁（特别是针对伊朗）之后，伊朗当局很可能改变了他们最初的立场。我认为这对双方来说都是一个错误。

text: FBI Director Kash Patel is suing The Atlantic and reporter Sarah Fitzpatrick for defamation over an article alleging he has a drinking problem and frequently misses work. Patel denies the allegations and is seeking $250 million. The Atlantic says it stands by its reporting and will fight the case.
text_zh: 联邦调查局局长卡什·帕特尔（Kash Patel）因一篇指控他有酗酒问题且经常旷工的文章，起诉《大西洋月刊》及其记者莎拉·菲茨帕特里克（Sarah Fitzpatrick）诽谤。帕特尔否认了这些指控，并寻求2.5亿美元的赔偿。《大西洋月刊》表示坚持其报道内容，并将应诉。

text: 🇷🇺 Russian Tu-22M3 long-range bombers conducted a patrol flight over the Baltic Sea, escorted by Su-35 fighters. The mission lasted over four hours. At various points along the route, the aircraft were shadowed by foreign fighter jets. All flights were conducted in strict accordance with international airspace regulations. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 俄罗斯图-22M3远程轰炸机在苏-35战斗机的护航下，在波罗的海上空进行了巡逻飞行。任务持续了四个多小时。在航线的不同阶段，这些飞机受到了外国战斗机的跟踪。所有飞行均严格按照国际空域法规进行。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 “Iranians Do Not Submit to Force” — Iran’s President Fires Back at American Regime 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 “伊朗人不会屈服于武力”——伊朗总统回击美国政权 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇺🇸 Pentagon-linked IT giant Palantir has published on its X page key excerpts from a book by company CEO Alexander Karp, The Technological Republic, in which he calls for the introduction of universal military conscription in the United States and the remilitarization of Germany and Japan. Palantir CEO Alexander Karp's book The Technological Republic — key theses: ➡️ Silicon Valley has a moral obligation to participate in national defense. The tech elite owes a debt to the country that made its rise possible. ➡️ The atomic age is ending. A new era of deterrence built on AI is beginning. The question is not whether AI weapons will be built — but who builds them and for what purpose. ➡️ Soft power has reached its limits. Democratic societies need hard power, and in this century hard power runs on software. ➡️ Universal military conscription should be seriously considered. The next war should only be fought if every citizen shares in the risk and cost. ➡️ Germany and Japan must be remilitarized. Their postwar disarmament was an overcorrection — Europe is already paying the price, and Japanese pacifism threatens the Asian balance of power. ➡️ Federal compensation is so poor that government struggles to attract real talent. Public servants should not be expected to take vows of poverty. ➡️ Cancel culture and the ruthless exposure of officials' private lives drives competent people away from government service — leaving the republic with empty vessels at the helm. ➡️ All cultures are not equal. Some have produced extraordinary advances; others have proven regressive. The West's hollow pluralism avoids this reality entirely. ➡️ The iPhone may be Silicon Valley's greatest achievement — and also a sign of civilizational stagnation. Consumer apps are not a substitute for grand ambition. ➡️ Elon Musk's pursuit of large-scale projects deserves respect, not mockery. Billionaires who build beyond self-enrichment should be applauded. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 与五角大楼有关联的IT巨头帕兰提尔（Palantir）在其X页面上发布了公司首席执行官亚历山大·卡普（Alexander Karp）所著《技术共和国》（The Technological Republic）一书的关键摘录，他在书中呼吁在美国实行全民义务兵役制，并要求德国和日本重新军事化。帕兰提尔首席执行官亚历山大·卡普的《技术共和国》一书关键论点：➡️ 硅谷有道德义务参与国防。科技精英欠这个使他们崛起国家的一笔债。➡️ 原子时代即将结束。一个建立在人工智能基础上的新威慑时代正在开始。问题不在于是否会制造人工智能武器，而在于由谁制造以及出于什么目的。➡️ 软实力已达到极限。民主社会需要硬实力，而在本世纪，硬实力依靠软件运行。➡️ 应认真考虑全民义务兵役制。下一场战争只有在每个公民都分担风险和成本的情况下才应进行。➡️ 德国和日本必须重新军事化。他们战后的裁军是一种矫枉过正——欧洲已经在付出代价，而日本的和平主义威胁着亚洲的权力平衡。➡️ 联邦薪酬太低，导致政府难以吸引真正的人才。不应期望公务员发誓过贫困生活。➡️ 取消文化和对官员私生活的无情曝光将有能力的人赶出了政府服务部门——使共和国的掌舵者空有其表。➡️ 并非所有文化都是平等的。一些文化产生了非凡的进步；另一些则被证明是倒退的。西方空洞的多元主义完全回避了这一现实。➡️ iPhone可能是硅谷最伟大的成就，但也可能是文明停滞的标志。消费类应用程序不能替代宏大的抱负。➡️ 埃隆·马斯克对大规模项目的追求值得尊重，而不是嘲笑。应该为那些超越自我致富而进行建设的亿万富翁鼓掌。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @BarakRavid : State Department official: The United States will host a second round of ambassador-level talks between Israel and Lebanon on Thursday, April 23, at the Department of State. The United States welcomes the productive engagement that began on April 14. We will continue to facilitate direct, good-faith discussions between the two governments tweet

text: Open Source Intel RT @hughhewitt : Which is why the “nuclear dust” as @POTUS calls it, must be recovered and sent to the U.S. to be neutralized. Anything less is a diplomatic defeat following a military victory. 60 Minutes: Iran still has nearly 1,000 pounds of highly-enriched uranium, "enough material, if you enrich it just a little bit more, for 10-11 nuclear bombs." text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 President Trump told Bloomberg it’s "highly unlikely" he would extend the two-week ceasefire with Iran if a deal is not reached before it ends, adding that the U.S. naval blockade will remain in effect until an agreement is finalized. "They want me to open it. The Iranians desperately want it opened. I’m not opening it until a deal is signed," Trump said. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 特朗普总统告诉彭博社，如果在此之前未达成协议，他“极不可能”延长与伊朗的两周停火协议，并补充说，在协议最终敲定之前，美国的海上封锁将继续有效。“他们想让我开放。伊朗人迫切希望开放。在协议签署之前，我不会开放，”特朗普说。 推文

text: 🇮🇷 "Honoring commitments is the basis of meaningful dialogue. Deep historical mistrust in Iran toward U.S. gov conduct remains, while unconstructive & contradictory signals from American officials carry a bitter message; they seek Iran's surrender. Iranians do not submit to force." - Iranian President Pazeshkian 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 “履行承诺是有意义对话的基础。伊朗对美国政府行为的深层历史不信任依然存在，而美国官员发出的非建设性且矛盾的信号传达了一个苦涩的信息；他们寻求伊朗的投降。伊朗人不会屈服于武力。” - 伊朗总统佩泽希齐扬 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian President Pezeshkian says that Iran will not submit to force but remains open to meaningful dialogue with the U.S. @wfwitness

text: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian: Honoring commitments is the basis of meaningful dialogue. Deep historical mistrust in Iran toward U.S. gov conduct remains, while unconstructive & contradictory signals from American officials carry a bitter message; they seek Iran's surrender. Iranians do not submit to force.
text_zh: 伊朗总统马苏德·佩泽希齐扬：履行承诺是有意义对话的基础。伊朗对美国政府行为的深层历史不信任依然存在，而美国官员发出的非建设性且矛盾的信号传达了一个苦涩的信息；他们寻求伊朗的投降。伊朗人不会屈服于武力。

text: 🇺🇸 Have you ever wondered what Trump's Truth Social actually looks like? The comments under his posts are nothing but boomer memes, AI slop, and ads — scroll for as long as you want, you won't find a single real person. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 你有没有想过特朗普的Truth Social到底是什么样子的？他帖子下的评论全是婴儿潮一代的表情包、AI垃圾内容和广告——无论你滚动多久，你都找不到一个真实的人。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 Iran's Decision to Skip Talks Unchanged — Tasnim News Iran's position on not participating in negotiations has not changed, a Tasnim News correspondent reports. Despite Trump's announcement that Vance and other members of the US negotiating team are en…" 🇺🇸 Meanwhile Trump... 🤷‍♂️ 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 伊朗决定不参加会谈的立场未变 — 塔斯尼姆通讯社（Tasnim News）报道，伊朗关于不参加谈判的立场没有改变。尽管特朗普宣布万斯（Vance）和其他美国谈判小组成员正在前往……” 🇺🇸 与此同时，特朗普…… 🤷‍♂️ 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷 JD Vance to Depart for Pakistan Tomorrow Amid Uncertainty Over Iran Talks Hotels in Islamabad hosting the delegation have already been cleared of guests ahead of the US team and media's arrival — however, it remains unclear whether negotiations will…" 🇮🇷 Iran's Decision to Skip Talks Unchanged — Tasnim News Iran's position on not participating in negotiations has not changed, a Tasnim News correspondent reports. Despite Trump's announcement that Vance and other members of the US negotiating team are en route to Pakistan, Iran's participation remains conditional on the fulfilment of certain preconditions. Trump made similar remarks yesterday, claiming the US negotiating team was heading to Islamabad. According to Tasnim's sources, the naval blockade remains a fundamental obstacle in the negotiations. The issue has been conveyed through the Pakistani intermediary, who confirmed today that the matter was raised directly with Trump. Beyond the blockade, Tehran says additional US demands contained in exchanged messages offer no clear path toward an agreement. The Iranian delegation holds that as long as Washington approaches the negotiating table with the same miscalculations that led to its heavy military defeat on the battlefield, talks would amount to nothing more than a waste of time — and Iran will not participate in that process. Tehran states it has no intention of taking part in what it describes as an "American theatre" until core obstacles are removed and a genuine horizon for an acceptable agreement takes shape. Iran is also accounting for the possibility that the media spectacle around negotiations is itself a deception, and says it remains prepared for military confrontation and a renewed strike against the United States. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷 在伊朗会谈不确定性中，JD·万斯将于明天启程前往巴基斯坦。伊斯兰堡接待代表团的酒店已在美方团队和媒体抵达前清空了客人——但目前尚不清楚谈判是否……” 🇮🇷 伊朗决定不参加会谈的立场未变 — 塔斯尼姆通讯社报道，伊朗关于不参加谈判的立场没有改变。尽管特朗普宣布万斯和其他美国谈判小组成员正在前往巴基斯坦的途中，但伊朗的参与仍以满足某些先决条件为前提。特朗普昨天发表了类似的言论，声称美国谈判小组正在前往伊斯兰堡。据塔斯尼姆通讯社的消息来源称，海上封锁仍然是谈判中的根本障碍。这一问题已通过巴基斯坦中间人传达，中间人今天证实该问题已直接向特朗普提出。除了封锁之外，德黑兰表示，交换信息中包含的美国额外要求并未提供明确的达成协议途径。伊朗代表团认为，只要华盛顿带着导致其在战场上惨败的同样误判来到谈判桌前，谈判就无异于浪费时间——而伊朗不会参与这一进程。德黑兰表示，在核心障碍消除且可接受的协议前景明朗之前，它无意参与其所称的“美国式表演”。伊朗也在考虑谈判周围的媒体炒作本身可能是一种欺骗的可能性，并表示已为军事对抗和对美国的再次打击做好了准备。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Trump: I’m not going to be rushed into making a bad deal. We’ve got all the time in the world. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text_zh: — 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 《纽约邮报》外交政策记者凯特琳·多恩博斯：“不属实”。@Middle_East_Spectator

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench: "Trump claims he will sign deal with Iran 'Today' in Pakistan. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench" 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench：“特朗普声称他将于‘今天’在巴基斯坦与伊朗签署协议。🚩 @RezistanceTrench” 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: Dir Siryan has been demolished by the Israeli army A ceasefire for them to demolish times without repercussions and without being shot at
text_zh: Dir Siryan已被以色列军队拆毁。停火协议让他们在没有后果、没有被射击的情况下多次进行拆毁。

text: Never trust a Jew to uphold an agreement ❗️ The strike by an israeli drone targeted the vicinity of the Litani River course in the town of Qaqaait Al Jisr. It was a cafe. Two casualties
text_zh: 永远不要相信犹太人会遵守协议 ❗️ 以色列无人机袭击了Qaqaait Al Jisr镇利塔尼河河道附近。那是一家咖啡馆。造成两人伤亡。

text: Trump said it’s “highly unlikely” he’ll extend the two-week ceasefire with Iran without a deal, and the Strait of Hormuz will stay blocked until an agreement is reached. Source: Bloomberg
text_zh: 特朗普表示，如果达不成协议，他“极不可能”延长与伊朗为期两周的停火协议，且在达成协议前，霍尔木兹海峡将保持封锁状态。来源：彭博社

text: Brazilian President Lula: If Germany and Brazil were finalists in the World Cup, we invite Trump to watch the World Cup with us, seeing the dispute between Brazil and Germany. And certainly this time it should be Brazil’s turn to win, because last time Germany won 7 to 1 against Brazil.
text_zh: 巴西总统卢拉：如果德国和巴西进入世界杯决赛，我们邀请特朗普和我们一起看世界杯，观看巴西和德国之间的较量。当然，这次应该是巴西获胜，因为上次德国以7比1战胜了巴西。

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @Nrg8000 : the AI-generated overlay grid on this obviously AI-generated 'satellite imagery' points to the middle of the Gulf of Saint Lawrence. (not to mention the impossibility of this one site stretching around 10 decimal degrees. ~1,000km) https://twitter.com/Nrg8000/status/2046238762733371804/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）转发 @Nrg8000：这张明显是人工智能生成的“卫星图像”上的AI生成覆盖网格指向圣劳伦斯湾中部。（更不用说这个单一地点跨越约10个十进制度数，即约1,000公里的不可能性。）https://twitter.com/Nrg8000/status/2046238762733371804/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Vance is now expected to leave Washington for Pakistan on Tuesday (tomorrow) for Iran talks- US officials to NYT. The ceasefire is currently believed to expire at 8 p.m. EST tomorrow. tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 美国官员向《纽约时报》透露，万斯预计将于周二（明天）离开华盛顿前往巴基斯坦进行伊朗会谈。目前认为停火协议将于美国东部时间明天晚上8点到期。推文

text: Open Source Intel UPDATE 🔴 President Trump says the Strait of Hormuz will remain closed for Iran until a deal is finalized. Very good update. ICYMI, Reuters reports Pakistan is pushing President Trump to open the naval blockade so talks can move forward. According to the report, President Trump said he would consider it. This has not been confirmed by the Trump administration. Hard to see President Trump lifting the blockade right now. It is the only leverage that is clearly working, especially as pressure builds and IRGC salaries start drying up. If you are going to open it, do it in 4 weeks, not now. If this is true, then maybe a miracle is happening behind the scenes and the regime is actually ready to give up its nukes and other concessions. We will see. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 更新 🔴 特朗普总统表示，在达成协议之前，霍尔木兹海峡将继续对伊朗关闭。非常好的更新。如果你错过了，路透社报道称巴基斯坦正在敦促特朗普总统解除海军封锁，以便会谈能够推进。据报道，特朗普总统表示会考虑。这一点尚未得到特朗普政府的证实。很难想象特朗普总统现在会解除封锁。这是目前唯一明显有效的筹码，尤其是在压力增大且伊斯兰革命卫队工资开始枯竭的情况下。如果你要开放，请在4周后进行，而不是现在。如果这是真的，那么也许幕后正在发生奇迹，政权实际上准备放弃核武器和其他让步。我们将拭目以待。 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW: A source familiar with the matter says Vance remains in the U.S. and has not left for Pakistan yet. Something going on. NEW 🔴 Trump To New York Post: "Vice President J.D. Vance and the American delegation for peace talks with Iran are on their way to Pakistan and are expected to land within hours. Willing to meet with senior Iranian leaders if a breakthrough is achieved" https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046223499081965624/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 最新消息：一位知情人士称，万斯仍在美国，尚未启程前往巴基斯坦。有些事情正在发生。最新消息 🔴 特朗普对《纽约邮报》表示：“副总统J.D.万斯和美国与伊朗和平谈判代表团正在前往巴基斯坦的途中，预计将在几小时内降落。如果取得突破，愿意会见伊朗高级领导人。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046223499081965624/photo/1 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel FBI Director Kash Patel has filed a $250 million lawsuit against The Atlantic over allegations of alcohol abuse. - CNBC https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046240957159403897/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 联邦调查局局长卡什·帕特尔已就酗酒指控对《大西洋月刊》提起2.5亿美元的诉讼。 - CNBC https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046240957159403897/photo/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @TheIntelFrog : Yesterday, US Air Force C-17A Globemaster III #AE1179 as RCH783 landed at Ramstein AB, Germany completing at least the 25th medical evacuation flight out of the Middle East since the beginning of Operation EPIC FURY. As of this morning, there have been 415 WIA and 13 KIA. 1/2 https://twitter.com/TheIntelFrog/status/2046229483741438393/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）转发 @TheIntelFrog：昨天，美国空军C-17A环球霸王III #AE1179作为RCH783降落在德国拉姆施泰因空军基地，完成了自“史诗愤怒行动”开始以来至少第25次从中东撤离伤员的飞行。截至今天早上，已有415人受伤，13人死亡。1/2 https://twitter.com/TheIntelFrog/status/2046229483741438393/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Conflicting reports on the nature and timing of ceasefire talks in Islamabad, Pakistan continue to abound, as CNN has said that talks are set for tomorrow, contradicting reports from the New York Post that the U.S. delegation, led by U.S. Vice President JD Vance is set to land in Pakistan today for talks. Additionally, according to Reuters, citing a senior Iranian official, Iran is considering attending talks in Islamabad as Pakistani mediators work to end the U.S, blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 关于伊斯兰堡停火谈判的性质和时间的相互矛盾的报道层出不穷，美国有线电视新闻网（CNN）称谈判定于明天进行，这与《纽约邮报》关于由美国副总统JD·万斯率领的美国代表团定于今天抵达巴基斯坦进行谈判的报道相矛盾。此外，据路透社援引一位伊朗高级官员的话称，伊朗正在考虑参加在伊斯兰堡举行的会谈，巴基斯坦调解人正努力结束美国对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁。推文

text: Disclose.tv NEW - U.S. Government to begin refunding $166 billion in tariffs charged under Trump to businesses in wake of Supreme Court decision — Fox https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2046238552342594025/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 在最高法院做出裁决后，美国政府将开始向企业退还特朗普执政期间征收的1660亿美元关税 — 福克斯新闻 https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2046238552342594025/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner ‼️ 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 BREAKING | Donald Trump states that the ceasefire agreement will no longer be extended, and if the agreement is not reached, then the bombing will begin. According to Trump, he does not know whether the Iranian delegation will go to Pakistan for negotiations. For reference, according to Trump, the American delegation has already traveled to Pakistan, but the media reports that Vance, Witkoff, and Kushner will travel to Islamabad tomorrow. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner ‼️ 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 突发 | 唐纳德·特朗普表示，停火协议将不再延长，如果达不成协议，轰炸就会开始。据特朗普称，他不知道伊朗代表团是否会前往巴基斯坦进行谈判。作为参考，据特朗普称，美国代表团已经前往巴基斯坦，但媒体报道称万斯、威特科夫和库什纳将于明天前往伊斯兰堡。与我们一起查看最新更新：@visionergeo 推文

text: Open Source Intel As Vance heads to Pakistan, Iran says its “weighing whether to join U.S. peace talks in Pakistan” a senior Iranian official told Reuters. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 随着万斯前往巴基斯坦，一位伊朗高级官员告诉路透社，伊朗表示正在“权衡是否加入在美国巴基斯坦举行的和平谈判”。推文

text: WarTranslated The Financial Times reports that Ukraine is being offered a form of partial EU membership, which would allow participation in meetings and discussions, but without voting rights or access to the common budget. France and Germany are currently discussing this option. https://www.ft.com/content/d44b90f3-cc5c-4681-b5e6-6a3b70936204 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 《金融时报》报道称，乌克兰被提供了一种部分欧盟成员国身份，这将允许其参加会议和讨论，但没有投票权或进入共同预算的权利。法国和德国目前正在讨论这一选项。https://www.ft.com/content/d44b90f3-cc5c-4681-b5e6-6a3b70936204 推文

text: Brazilian President Lula: I do not believe Iran is building a nuclear bomb — just as I did not believe that Saddam had nuclear weapons when Bush invaded Iraq. From time to time, people build a false myth to justify an opposition that is unrecognizable and irresponsible.
text_zh: 巴西总统卢拉：我不相信伊朗正在制造核弹——就像我不相信布什入侵伊拉克时萨达姆拥有核武器一样。人们不时地编造一个虚假的神话，来为一种不可辨认且不负责任的反对派辩护。

text: Brazilian President Lula: It is important to know that Cuba is the victim of a 70-year blockade. That is a world shame, you know? A world shame. A country that, after the revolution, never had the chance to decide its own destiny because a major power imposed an ideological blockade on Cuba.
text_zh: 巴西总统卢拉：重要的是要知道古巴是70年封锁的受害者。那是一个世界耻辱，你知道吗？一个世界耻辱。一个在革命后从未有机会决定自己命运的国家，因为一个大国对古巴实施了意识形态封锁。

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench: "🇺🇸 PBS Reporter: "Will Iran participate in the Islamabad talks?" Trump: "I don't know, but they are supposed to be there" Reporter: "What if they are not?" Trump: "That's fine too. If they attend, great, and if they don't, that's great too" 🚩 @RezistanceTrench" Trump claims he will sign deal with Iran 'Today' in Pakistan. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench：“🇺🇸 PBS记者：‘伊朗会参加伊斯兰堡会谈吗？’ 特朗普：‘我不知道，但他们应该会在那里。’ 记者：‘如果他们不在呢？’ 特朗普：‘那也没关系。如果他们参加，很好；如果他们不参加，那也很好。’ 🚩 @RezistanceTrench” 特朗普声称他将于‘今天’在巴基斯坦与伊朗签署协议。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Bloomberg: U.S. President Trump said it is “highly unlikely” the United States will extend the current ceasefire with Iran if a deal is not reached before it expires. He clarified that the expiration time for the ceasefire is Wednesday evening in Washington D.C. He also reiterated that he will not approve of what he assess to be a bad deal with the Iranians. “I’m not going to be rushed into making a bad deal. We’ve got all the time in the world.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 彭博社：美国总统特朗普表示，如果不能在停火协议到期前达成协议，美国“极不可能”延长目前的停火协议。他澄清说，停火协议的到期时间是华盛顿特区的周三晚上。他还重申，他不会批准他评估为对伊朗不利的协议。“我不会被匆忙推向达成一个糟糕的协议。我们有的是时间。” @wfwitness

text: Brazilian President Lula: I want the United States to be the way they want to be. I want Germany to organize itself the way Germany wants. I want Brazil to organize itself the way Brazilian society wants. No one can interfere in our organization. No one.
text_zh: 巴西总统卢拉：我希望美国成为他们想要的样子。我希望德国按照德国想要的方式组织自己。我希望巴西按照巴西社会想要的方式组织自己。没有人可以干涉我们的组织。没有人。

text: Brazilian President Lula: I will be against the invasion of Cuba, just as I was against [the invasions of] Venezuela, against Ukraine, against Gaza, and against Iran. I am against any lack of respect for the territorial integrity of nations.
text_zh: 巴西总统卢拉：我将反对入侵古巴，就像我反对[入侵]委内瑞拉、反对乌克兰、反对加沙和反对伊朗一样。我反对任何不尊重国家领土完整的行为。
